bestiary.confluence.filter.surface_mushr: The Glowing Mushroom biome, also known as the Glowing Mushroom Fields, is a biome characterized by Mushroom Grass, Glowing Mushrooms, and giant Glowing Mushrooms that grow on mud blocks.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_corruptio: The Corruption is an evil biome with a theme of deep purple wasteland, death, and decay.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_crimson.d: The Crimson is an evil biome with a theme of fleshy infection and blood.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_dungeon.d: The Dungeon is a massive underground brick maze.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_hallow.de: The Hallow is a Hardmode surface biome characterized by its bright, fairy-tale imagery.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_jungle.de: The Jungle is a surface biome primarily composed of grass, vines, mud, jungle trees, bamboo, and water pools.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_nether.de: The Nether is the deepest layer in the world. It merges with the Underworld to form the Ash biome.
bestiary.confluence.filter.the_temple.de: The Jungle Temple (also known as the Jungle Lizard Temple) is a closed structure located in the Underground Jungle, built from Jungle Lizard Bricks.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground.d: The Underground layer is located between y0 ~ y40.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_c: The Underground Corruption is a biome. It is the underground version of the surface Corruption, appearing from the Cavern layer and below.
The Underground Crimson is a biome. It is the underground version of the surface Crimson, appearing from the Cavern layer and below.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_d: The Underground Desert is a biome located directly beneath the world's main Desert.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_h: The Underground Hallow is the underground version of the surface Hallow, appearing from the Cavern layer and below.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_j: The Underground Jungle is a dense network of small caves, primarily composed of mud, water pools, spiky bushes, and hive traps. It lies beneath the surface Jungle biome and extends into the Cavern layer.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_m: The Glowing Mushroom biome, also known as the Glowing Mushroom Fields, is a biome characterized by Mushroom Grass, Glowing Mushrooms, and giant Glowing Mushrooms that grow on mud blocks.
bestiary.confluence.filter.underground_s: The Underground Snow is a biome and is the underground variant of the Snow biome.
bestiary.confluence.filter.vortex_pillar: The Vortex Pillar is a ranged-themed Celestial Pillar.
bestiary.confluence.filter.windy_day.des: A Windy Day is an event that occurs when the wind speed exceeds 20 mph.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.allay.desc: The Allay is a pure and kind soul that loves music.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.armadillo.desc: The Armadillo is a small creature that can curl into a ball to protect itself.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.axolotl.desc: Axolotls are amphibious creatures living in underground water that can heal players and attack hostile mobs.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.bat.desc: Bats are small flying creatures that inhabit caves and are active at night.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.bee.desc: Bees are creatures that pollinate and produce honey, and will sting when provoked.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.blaze.desc: Blazes are hostile mobs in the Nether that shoot fireballs at players.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.bogged.desc: Bogged are hostile mobs that appear in swamps at night and cause slowness.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.breeze.desc: Breezes are flying hostile mobs that shoot wind blasts to push players away.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.camel.desc: Camels are desert mounts that can carry two people.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.cat.desc: Cats are tamed pets that can scare away Creepers and bring gifts.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.cave_spider.de: Cave Spiders are small spider variants living in abandoned mineshafts that inflict a poison effect.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.chicken.desc: Chickens are common farm animals that lay eggs and can be attracted by wheat seeds.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.cod.desc: Cod are common fish living in oceans and can serve as a food source.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.cow.desc: Cows are farm animals that provide milk, beef, and leather, and they love to eat grass.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.creeper.desc: Creepers are hostile mobs that sneak up and explode, and they are afraid of cats.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.dolphin.desc: A playful sea mammal whose intelligence rivals that of humanity.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.donkey.desc: Donkeys are tamed creatures used for transporting items and can be equipped with chests.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.drowned.desc: Drowned are underwater zombie variants that attack with tridents or fishing rods.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.elder_guardian: Elder Guardians are powerful guardians of ocean monuments that apply mining fatigue.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.ender_dragon.d: The Ender Dragon guards the End dimension.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.enderman.desc: Endermen are neutral mobs that can teleport and become hostile when stared at.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.endermite.desc: Endermites are small hostile mobs, usually spawning when using Ender Pearls to teleport.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.evoker.desc: Evokers are hostile illagers that summon Vexes and attack with magic.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.fox.desc: Foxes are cute but cunning creatures that steal items and can be tamed with berries.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.frog.desc: Prefers bodies of water filled with thick growth. Perfectly content both on land and underwater.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.ghast.desc: Ghasts are large flying creatures in the Nether that shoot fireballs at players.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.glow_squid.des: Glow Squids are bioluminescent creatures in caves, and their ink sacs can make fluorescent items.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.goat.desc: Goats live in mountains, are good at jumping, and will ram players and creatures.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.guardian.desc: Guardians are creatures that protect ocean monuments and attack intruders with lasers.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.hoglin.desc: Hoglins are hostile mobs in the Nether that drop pork when killed.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.horse.desc: Horses are tamed mounts with different speeds and jumping abilities depending on their breed.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.husk.desc: Husks are zombie variants in deserts that don't burn in sunlight and cause hunger.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.iron_golem.des: Iron Golems are village guardians made of iron blocks and pumpkins that attack hostile mobs.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.llama.desc: Llamas are creatures that can carry items, spit to defend themselves, and form caravans.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.magma_cube.des: Magma Cubes are hostile mobs in the Nether made of magma that split into smaller ones.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.mooshroom.desc: Mooshrooms are special cows on mushroom islands that provide mushroom stew and mycelium.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.mule.desc: Mules are hybrid offspring of horses and donkeys, with strong load-bearing capacity but unable to breed.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.ocelot.desc: Ocelots live in jungles, can be tamed with raw fish, and can scare away Creepers.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.panda.desc: Pandas live in jungles, have different personalities, and love to eat bamboo.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.phantom.desc: Phantoms are flying hostile mobs that spawn when players don't sleep for a long time.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.pig.desc: Pigs are farm animals attracted by carrots, which can be ridden and controlled with a carrot on a stick.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.piglin.desc: Piglins are creatures in the Nether that trade with players and are afraid of soul fire.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.piglin_brute.d: Piglin Brutes are powerful hostile mobs in the Nether that protect bastion remnants.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.pillager.desc: Pillagers are hostile illagers that participate in raids on villages.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.polar_bear.des: Polar Bears live in snowy areas, with adult individuals being aggressive and protecting their cubs.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.pufferfish.des: Pufferfish inflate when threatened, and their toxins can be used to make potions.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.rabbit.descrip: Rabbits are wild animals good at jumping and can be a source of food.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.ravager.desc: Ravagers are mounts of illagers with strong attack power and health.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.salmon.desc: Salmon are fish that swim upstream and can be cooked into delicious food.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.sheep.desc: Sheep are farm animals that provide wool, which can be dyed and used to make cloth.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.shulker.desc: Shulkers are creatures in the End that disguise themselves as blocks and shoot bullets to make players float.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.silverfish.des: Silverfish are small hostile mobs that hide in stones and summon companions when attacked.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.skeleton.desc: Who needs muscles, skin, or even eyeballs? Skeletons get by with just the bones on their back, just as deadly as more fleshy foes.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.skeleton_horse: Skeleton Horses are undead creatures, usually spawned during thunderstorms and can be tamed.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.slime.desc: Slimes are jelly-like hostile mobs that jump to attack and split into smaller slimes when killed.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.sniffer.desc: The Sniffer is an ancient creature that can sniff out seeds buried underground.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.snow_golem.des: Snow Golems are creatures made of snow blocks and pumpkins that throw snowballs to attack enemies.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.spider.desc: Spiders are nocturnal hostile mobs that can climb walls and become neutral during the day.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.squid.desc: Squids are cephalopods in oceans that squirt ink to escape danger.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.stray.desc: Strays are skeleton variants in snowy areas that shoot arrows with slowness effect.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.strider.desc: Striders are creatures in the Nether that can walk on lava and serve as mounts.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.tadpole.desc: Tadpoles are the larvae of frogs that live in water and gradually develop into adults.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.trader_llama.d: Trader Llamas are creatures that follow Wandering Traders and can be tamed and equipped.
Tropical Fish are colorful marine creatures that can be kept as ornamental pets.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.turtle.desc: These slow, stoic creatures travel between lakes and dry land, carrying a hard shell on their backs for protection.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.vex.desc: Vexes are small flying hostile mobs summoned by Evokers that can pass through walls.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.villager.desc: Villagers are humans living in villages who can trade with players.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.vindicator.des: Vindicators are hostile illagers that attack players with axes.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.wandering_trad: Wandering Traders appear randomly in the world and sell rare items.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.warden.desc: The Warden is a powerful creature deep in caves that senses players through sound and vibrations.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.witch.desc: Witches are hostile mobs that attack players with various potions and drop potion ingredients.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.wither.desc: The Wither can only be summoned by players and shoots Wither Skulls to cause large-scale damage.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.wither_skeleto: Wither Skeletons are hostile mobs in Nether fortresses that cause wither effect.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.wolf.desc: Wolves are tamable creatures that become loyal companions after taming and help attack enemies.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.zoglin.desc: Zoglins are hoglins infected with the zombie virus and are aggressive.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.zombie.desc: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.zombie_village: Zombie Villagers are infected villagers that can be cured with a Weakness potion and a Golden Apple.
bestiary.entity.minecraft.zombified_pigl: Zombified Piglins are neutral mobs in the Nether that counterattack in groups when attacked.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.angler.desc: The Angler, a rude fishing genius, sends others to find weird, rare fish. He rewards random items, entertained by any misfortunes.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.angry_bones: Cursed with undeath, the former inhabitants of the Dungeon roam endlessly through its halls, seeking a victim for their unending fury.
Cursed with undeath, the former inhabitants of the Dungeon roam endlessly through its halls, seeking a victim for their unending fury.
Cursed with undeath, the former inhabitants of the Dungeon roam endlessly through its halls, seeking a victim for their unending fury.
Cursed with undeath, the former inhabitants of the Dungeon roam endlessly through its halls, seeking a victim for their unending fury.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.antlion_swa: Antlion Swarmers patrol their nests with a watchful eye. Should anyone threaten their eggs, they will defend them fiercely.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.armored_ske: Remnants of a long lost expeditionary force, these stout warriors mindlessly patrol the caves in which they died.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.arms_dealer: The Arms Dealer has everything anyone could need to shoot things dead, from little round bullets to guns made from sharks.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.bird.desc: A simple white bird which enjoys a calm sunny day.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.black_scorp: Despite its menacing appearance, it is quite docile unless threatened or facing smaller prey. Fish are occasionally attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.black_slime: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.blood_crawl: Most spiders operate independently, but ones touched by the Crimson hive coordinate together to consume life.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.blood_mummy: The blood-dripping organic matter in these mummies display far better preservation than the rest of their ilk.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.blood_zombi: With enough exposure to a Blood Moon, zombies become twisted and cursed with everflowing blood pouring out from their rotten flesh.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.bloody_spor: The Crimson recognizes that Creepers are the easiest creatures to spread its flesh.
Glowing winged humanoid creatures the size of a butterfly. Attuned to the world around them, they excel at finding shiny things.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.blue_jay.de: This little blue bird came looking for worms.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.blue_jellyf: That strange tingling sensation in the water may be the unwelcome surging of electrical death from a brainless jellyfish. Swim with care.
A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.bone_serpen: Mighty serpentine dragons once ruled hell, but long ago shed their obsidian scales. A skeletal husk is all that remains.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.brain_of_ct: A piece of Cthulhu torn asunder, this vile mastermind pulses with agony and aids the Crimson in an attempt to avenge its master.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.bunny.desc: Fuzzy wuzzy creatures that prefer safe, friendly locations.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.butterfly.0: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! They are worth great coin to shopkeepers and fish absolutely love golden bait!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.butterfly.1: Beautiful fluttering insects that love sunrises. Fish are attracted to these based on their color variety.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.cardinal.de: A rare, red-crested friend of the forest.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.cave_bat.de: They are small, hard to see, and swiftly flap about in unpredictable ways. They often carry diseases, such as rabies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.clothier.de: Once trapped under a curse, the Clothier is the master of thread. If it's fashion that's desired, he's the man! He talks in a familiar way.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.corrupt_mim: Mimics which fall to Corruption grow larger and more powerful as a result. They can be birthed from ordinary chests by force.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.corrupt_sli: Steeped in the power of Corruption, these slimes can survive being cut apart into smaller pieces, unlike their untainted brethren.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.crab.desc: This hard shelled coastal creature could snip the toes right off a man, among other things. They are not to be trifled with.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.crimera.des: The most common horror to be born from the Crimson, it seeks to consume pure things with unrelenting hunger.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.crimslime.d: Taking on the consistency of congealed blood and flesh, Crimslimes seek out and digest more raw material for the Crimson.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.crimson_mim: Mimics which are enthralled by the Crimson are empowered dramatically. They can be birthed from ordinary chests by force.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.cursed_skul: Exposed to dark rituals, this skull has begun floating around on its own, chasing the living. Its touch leaves its victims defenseless.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.dark_caster: Doomed to watch over the Dungeon, these mages teleport to confuse their prey, before striking them down with a blast of water.
With the sands transmogrified by outside forces, those put to rest in the desert, whether good or evil, now rise to maim and kill.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.decayeder.d: Skeletons reanimated by the Corrupted; fragile yet adept at spreading evil thoughts.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demolitioni: Tread carefully around this dwarf. The Demolitionist is an explosive fanatic and sells dangerous things that go 'Boom!'
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon.desc: Demons are the infantry of the underworld. Unlike their lesser brothers, they cast shadow magic rather than hell magic.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye.d: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_c: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_d: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_g: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_o: No one knows who dressed these demon eyes up in cute costumes, but the whole process hasn't made them any friendlier.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_p: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.demon_eye_s: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
No one knows who dressed these demon eyes up in cute costumes, but the whole process hasn't made them any friendlier.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.desert_slim: Deserts are very dry, but the Sand Slime seems to have successfully adapted to the harsh conditions by becoming a pile of living sand.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.devourer.de: Worm-like monstrosities are the Corruption's most favored creatures, tunneling underneath unsuspecting victims.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.dragonfly.d: A swift-flying insect which hunts mosquitoes. Comes in a variety of colors. Fish are somewhat attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.drippler.de: Demon eyes become erratic under a Blood Moon, sometimes twisting together into a dripping cluster of cursed blood and eyeballs.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.dryad.desc: The Dryad is the last of her kind. She is connected with nature and can analyze its purity worldwide. She sells seeds, too!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.duck.0.desc: A water fowl with beautiful plumage. Swims in the purest of water, quacking happily.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.duck.1.desc: A white feathered waterfowl that swims in pure water and basks in the warm sun.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.dungeon_gua: A lethal sentry that stands watch over the Dungeon's gates. Those who are deemed unworthy to enter shall not pass!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.dungeon_sli: Slimes in the Dungeon became powerful by feeding off the cursed energy throughout the place. They seem particularly attracted to keys.
Eccentric and rather snobby to a fault, the Dye Trader has expensive tastes. He is passionate about the materials used in the dyes he sells.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.eater_of_so: Birthed from the Corruption as a being of pure malice, its sole instincts are to pursue, punish, and kill.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.eater_of_wo: Conceived from the bottomless malice of the Corruption, this mighty abyssal worm tunnels wildly to devour all in its path.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.explosive_b: Not the typical garden-variety bunny. This one has been tampered with, and has an explosive temper as a result.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.eye_of_cthu: A piece of Cthulhu ripped from his body centuries ago in a bloody war. It wanders the night seeking its host body... and revenge!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.face_monste: It would be unwise to face off with one of these unfeeling, hungry mutations. Their mouths are large enough to devour all things.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.faeling.0.d: These scintillating fairy-like creatures are born when animals wander into the glowing depths of a Shimmer pond.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.fire_imp.de: A lesser demon imbued with hell magic. Capable of teleporting and hurling phantom fireballs towards their foes.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.firefly.des: Appears at night in calm locations, illuminating the sky with strobing green light. Fish are fairly attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.flying_fish: Certain species of fish gain the most peculiar abilities when it rains. They only like one thing about land-dwellers: their flesh.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ghost.desc: During the most harrowing times, these apparitions float aimlessly through the depths to steal the life from those they envy.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.giant_antli: Antlion Swarmers patrol their nests with a watchful eye. Should anyone threaten their eggs, they will defend them fiercely.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.giant_shell: To overcome their slow speed, shellies have developed the ability to hide inside their spiked shell and hurl themselves at their foes.
These itty bitty diggy dawgs dig through the earth and take focused spelunkers by surprise, causing unwanted distress.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.glowing_sna: A snail that has mutated to adapt to the glowing mushroom environment. Fish are significantly attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.goblin_scou: The Goblin Army sends lone soldiers out from the beaches to seek out colonies to conquer. They give warning with a tattered sigil.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.goblin_tink: Exiled from the rest of goblinkind for being an intelligent pacifist, the Tinkerer sells tools for combining accessories into stronger versions.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.gold_bird.d: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! Shopkeepers will pay handsomely for these, or you can show them off in cages!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.gold_goldfi: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! Shopkeepers will pay handsomely for these, or you can show them off in cages!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.gold_water_: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! They are worth great coin to shopkeepers and fish absolutely love golden bait!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.golden_mimi: Talking to a chest doesn't cause craziness, but if the chest answers back, it may cause death! It still contains rare treasure, regardless!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.goldfish.de: A seemingly ordinary goldfish, until it decides to rain.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.granite_ele: Earth elementals manifest through many forms by taking on the properties of different materials, such as this hardy granite.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.grasshopper: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! They are worth great coin to shopkeepers and fish absolutely love golden bait!
It leaps tall blades of grass in a single bound. Fish are fairly attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.gray_cockat: A very social animal by nature, these close cousins of parrots can often be taught to say simple phrases.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.green_fairy: Glowing winged humanoid creatures the size of a butterfly. Attuned to the world around them, they excel at finding shiny things.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.green_jelly: That strange tingling sensation in the water may be the unwelcome surging of electrical death from a brainless jellyfish. Swim with care.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.green_slime: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.grubby.desc: Slimy, yet satisfying! Fish are somewhat attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.guide.desc: The Guide always offers useful advice and crafting recipes. His origins and unusual connections to this world remain a mystery.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hallowed_mi: Mimics struck with the blessing surge with energy and become powerful. They can be birthed from ordinary chests by force.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.harpy.desc: Winged, demi-human women defend their territory against invaders by impaling them with their razor-sharp feathers.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hell_butter: A solemn butterfly seeking blooms rooted in hell. Its wings glimmer with fiery veins.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hellbat.des: What's worse than a rabid, fast-flying, and annoying flying rodent? One that is on fire, of course!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hill_of_fle: The duality of the world has forged the Wall of Flesh into another adaptive form for the world. As the core and guardian of the world, this towering demon lord exists to seal away the powerful ancient souls.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet.desc: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet_fatt: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet_hone: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet_leaf: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet_spik: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.hornet_stin: Aggressive flying insects which swarm the jungle depths. Their venomous barbs discharge over great distances at high velocity.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ice_bat.des: As if bats weren't enough of a nuisance already, Ice Bats can freeze flesh solid with a touch, leaving their prey defenseless.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ice_mimic.d: Talking to a chest doesn't cause craziness, but if the chest answers back, it may cause death! It still contains rare treasure, regardless!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ice_slime.d: Slimes that spent too long in arctic temperatures may begin to partially freeze, developing a shifting layer of ice on their surface.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.illuminant_: Slimes exposed to the light of the Hallow's crystals begin to emit that very same light, glowing brightly in the darkness.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.jewel_bunny: These colorful rabbits made their way so deep, their reaction to magicked gems resulted in a coveted sparkling appearance.
These colorful rabbits made their way so deep, their reaction to magicked gems resulted in a coveted sparkling appearance.

These small, annoying creatures aren't to be underestimated. A deadly end awaits for those swarmed by these fangy rodents.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.jungle_slim: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
Slimes normally aren't intelligent, but occasionally they merge together to become a powerful force to swallow all things.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ladybug.0.d: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! They are worth great coin to shopkeepers and fish absolutely love golden bait!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.ladybug.1.d: A brilliant red insect often associated with luck. Fishing with these as bait may result in unwanted karma.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.lava_bat.de: What's worse than a rabid, fast-flying, and annoying flying rodent? One that is on fire, of course!
Due to the heat of the underworld, these slimes have taken on the properties of lava. Slaying them is difficult and dangerous.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.leech.desc: A worm-like parasite spit forth from the Wall of Flesh, filled with the lifeblood of its host. This blood has healing properties.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.light_mummy: With the sands transmogrified by outside forces, those put to rest in the desert, whether good or evil, now rise to maim and kill.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.lost_girl.d: Naked and afraid, this girl stands still, deep in the world, as if waiting for someone to rescue her and lead her to the surface.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.maggot.desc: An unsavory larval bug which feasts on dead, rotting matter. Fish are somewhat attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.magma_snail: A unique species of snail which withstands extreme heat. Its boiling slime trail melts down most weaker surfaces.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.man_eater.d: A sharp-toothed plant with a taste for human flesh. It has the ability to hide inside the mud and reach over great distances.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.mechanic.de: The Mechanic was imprisoned for her aptitude in engineering. She sells wiring and tools for putting together anything imaginable.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.merchant.de: The Merchant acts as a simple general store of sorts, providing useful starter tools and supplies needed for exploration.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.meteor_head: When meteorites strike the surface, their fragments lay scattered for the taking. Some pieces are alive, and will attack.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.mother_slim: Critical to the lifecycle of the slime species, these oversized jiggling masses are often found carrying their young deep underground.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.mouse.desc: Mice squeak around harmlessly, looking for small insects in damp underground locations.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.mummy.desc: With the sands transmogrified by outside forces, those put to rest in the desert, whether good or evil, now rise to maim and kill.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.nurse.desc: The Nurse's snarky attitude and poor bedside manner may be scary, but for a price, she will cure all that ails a wounded Terrarian.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.nymph.desc: Masterfully deceives explorers by posing as a lost girl, then attacks with ferocious might, blood-lust in her eyes.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.old_man.des: This hapless Old Man carries the burden of a heavy curse. It's said at night he transforms into a horrific demon which guards the Dungeon.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.owl.desc: A large, wise predatory bird which hunts nocturnally from the tree tops.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.painter.des: The Painter can talk about all the different shades of colors with which one can paint the walls. He'll sell but a handful of them!
Positive beyond comprehension, the Party Girl will use any excuse to celebrate. She sells party favors and flashy things.
Glowing winged humanoid creatures the size of a butterfly. Attuned to the world around them, they excel at finding shiny things.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.pinky.desc: The smallest slime ever recorded, their extreme cellular density makes them incredibly durable for their small size. They eat money.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.piranha.des: Just one of these sharp-toothed fish can easily end a life. Luckily, they tend to swarm their victims in large groups! Life is grand.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.pixie.desc: A larger, more luminous form of fairy. Pixies provide the Hallow with more blessed light and aid in the cleansing of the land.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.possessed_a: Whatever possessed this suit of armor to suddenly walk about and start killing everyone? It lacks a corporeal body.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.prismatic_l: Should one of these luminescent beings perish in the chaos of night, a sleeping tyrant is rumored to violently awaken.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.purple_slim: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.queen_bee.d: This highly aggressive monstrosity responds violently when her larva is disturbed; the honey-laden hives are her home turf.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.raincoat_zo: Some zombies never leave home without their trusty raincoat. Comfy and dry, they pursue human flesh no matter the weather.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.rat.desc: These fuzzy rodents sniff about in putrid locations scavenging for food. They are avoided in fear of diseases they may carry.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.red_slime.d: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.scorpion.de: Harmlessly scuttles around the desert looking for food. Fish are barely attracted to these.
A soft-shelled reptile that prefers saltwater and marine prey.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.servant_of_: Young Demon Eyes newly birthed from the Eye of Cthulhu, brought forth to protect their master by any means necessary.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.shadow_mimi: Talking to a chest doesn't cause craziness, but if the chest answers back, it may cause death! It still contains rare treasure, regardless!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.skeletron.d: The disembodied bones of a former tyrant pulsed with a hatred so strong, it left behind a mighty curse which guards the Dungeon.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.sluggy.desc: Slow and covered in a slick mucus. Fish are especially attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.snail.desc: A slimy mollusk that thrives in damp, dark places. Fish are barely attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.snatcher.de: A sharp-toothed plant with a taste for human flesh. It has the ability to hide inside the mud and reach over great distances.
A strange, round furry mammal with an unusually large, protruding nose. They are extremely lightweight.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.spore_bat.d: The tables have turned on a variety of rabid bats, themselves enwrought with a deadly fungal infection.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.spore_skele: Skeletons meandering through more moist caverns become hosts for glowing fungal growth, greatly empowering them.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.spore_zombi: The fungus controlling the minds of these zombies wants only one thing: brains! This is very convenient for the zombie.
The fungus controlling the minds of these zombies wants only one thing: brains! This is very convenient for the zombie.
Fast moving and erratic woodland creatures with grayish-brown fur. Got nuts?
Rare, red-furred hyperactive rodents which scurry about the woods.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.the_bride.d: It's uncertain if the bride was wed before or after her death, but the story ends tragically for anyone who crosses her path.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.the_hungry_: The Wall of Flesh's many mouths, attached by bloody veins. As a last resort, they can tear away and hungrily chase down threats.
The Wall of Flesh's many mouths, attached by bloody veins. As a last resort, they can tear away and hungrily chase down threats.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.tomb_crawle: The desert is home to one of the largest varieties of worms across the land. It has a voracious appetite for careless explorers.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.traveling_m: The flamboyantly-dressed Traveling Merchant travels far and wide to bring unique, cultural wares from time to time.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.truffle.des: Harnessing the hidden power of the glowing mushroom, the Truffle forges weapons and tools exclusively in his mushroom home.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.undead_viki: Long before there were pirates, stories tell of powerful vikings who raged the seas. Their remains roam the icy caverns below.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.visual_neur: Manipulated through the hive mind of the Crimson, Visual Neuron serve as the brain's eyes and orbit around it for defense in numbers.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.voodoo_demo: Higher ranking demons can possess a voodoo doll of the chosen one, whose soul is linked with the world's guardian himself.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wall_of_fle: Serving as the world's core and guardian, the towering demon lord exists to keep powerful ancient spirits sealed away.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wandering_e: That suspicious feeling of being watched may very well come true in the dark of night, when Cthulhu's minions roam the skies.
For mysterious reasons, fish are known to mutate with other living things or even man-made objects. This one is especially violent.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.water_strid: Glides elegantly along the surface of calm bodies of water searching for smaller bugs. Fish are occasionally attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.witch_docto: It's unusual for a Lihzahrd to be outside the Temple. Even more unusual are the voodoo things he sells. He prefers his jungle digs.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wither_bone: The high concentration of souls in the Soul Sand Valley has turned the remains of these serpentine dragons into deadlier threats.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wooden_mimi: Talking to a chest doesn't cause craziness, but if the chest answers back, it may cause death! It still contains rare treasure, regardless!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.worm.0.desc: Worms infused with fallen star magic glow with a glittering light. Fish are extremely attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.worm.1.desc: Rarely, critters are found coated entirely in gold! They are worth great coin to shopkeepers and fish absolutely love golden bait!
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.worm.2.desc: A slick, tubular invertebrate found hiding in rocks, dirt, and grass. Loves the rain. Fish are especially attracted to these.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wraith.desc: Souls belonging to the darkest of hearts were once sealed in the world's core. Now, they roam the night to add to their kind.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.wyvern.desc: A colossal dragon-like creature unleashed along with the ancient spirits. It rules the skies with its unrivaled might.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.yellow_slim: A simple, gelatinous creature that swallows anything and everything whole! It takes a long time to digest anything.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_bald: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_fema: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_pinc: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_slim: Sometimes, a slime's victim will turn into a zombie mid-digestion. Walking around like that is quite awkward for both parties.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_swam: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_torc: In life, this torch-wielding zombie joined an angry mob to hunt the undead. In death, it joined an undead mob to hunt the living.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zombie_twig: Leaving doors open may be an invitation for shambling brain-eaters to enter the home, and nobody likes that.
bestiary.entity.terra_entity.zoologist.d: The Zoologist, resident lycanthrope, adores animals. Her fox-like biology resulted from a cursed animal bite.

dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.attack_e: Pick on someone your own size!
Get rid of them! It's freaking me out.
This is what I live for!
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.cutting_: When you think about it, cacti are just prickly trees!
So, stone trees... what's up with that?
This is what I live for!
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.destroy_: How dare you do this to me!
You don't have to do this!
Are you sure you're feeling alright?
Remember how much fun we had chopping trees?
All work and no play makes me want to chop some trees.
Do you know what chop means?
There's nothing to chop in here!
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.idle.4: Let's find a small grove and just go nuts!
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.placed_b: From now on we'll be inseparable.
Ahh, I'm back where I belong.
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.placed_i: There's nothing to chop in here!
dialogs.confluence.lucy_the_axe.throw_on: Hey! I'd never throw you away!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.0: I'm bummed out! There's probably been fish that have gone extinct before I even was born, and that's not fair!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.1: Whaaaat?! Can't you see I'm winding up fishing line??
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.2: There's no chefs in all of %s, so I have to cook all this fish myself!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.3: I don't have a mommy or a daddy, but I have a lot of fish! It's close enough!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.4: Let a kid give you some advice, never touch your tongue to an ice block! Wait, forget what I said, I totally want to see you do it!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.5: Ever heard of a barking fish?! I haven't, I'm just wondering if you did!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.6: Hey! Watch it! I'm setting up traps for my biggest prank ever! No one will see it coming! Don't you dare tell anyone!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.7: %s is filled to the brim with the most outlandish kinds of fish!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.item.conflue: I found this spectacular place draped in giant glowing mushrooms! Everything was blue! I was picking some of the mushrooms I found next to a glistening blue lake, when one of the mushrooms snapped at me and swam away! I want to give it a taste of its own medicine, and give it a good chompin'! What I mean is, you gotta get it for me!(Caught in Glowing Mushroom Biomes)

Did you know there's magical islands that float up high in the sky? Bet you didn't! They say angels live in the sky, and I believe those angels have fins and gills and swim around! I believe you must catch one for me!(Caught in Sky Lakes)
Na na na na na na na Bat-FISH! That means go digging underground, fetch it, and bring it to me!(Caught in Underground & Caverns)

Ow! Don't get near me! I got stung by a Bloody Man-O-War! In case you're not smart enough to know what that is, it's the most menacing jellyfish in all of world ! Go to that rotten crimson and catch it if you dare! (Caught in Crimson)

Normally I could care less if I see fishbones floating in the water underground, but this one was swimming! What, you thought that only human skeletons still flailed about in world ? Get it for me so I can stick it in someone's bed!(Caught in Underground & Caverns)

The subterranean jungles of world have the weirdest things! Like, there's this fish I saw that looked just like a giant bumblebee! I'm allergic to bees, so you have to catch it for me! I bet it'd taste like a tuna and honey sandwich!(Caught in Honey)

Out in the forest, I was fishing right? Well guess what! A bunny hopped up to me! Then another one hopped up, and another... suddenly I'm surrounded by bunnies! One even swam up to me from the water, but it had no legs! I fell outta my chair in surprise and all the bunnies scurried off! I want that bunny fish as a pet, so you better catch it for me! Pronto!(Caught in Surface)

Yarr matey! Shiver me timbers! Avast, scallywags! There's a pirate captain who once had a pet fish named Cap'n Tunabeard, but during a big storm the fishbowl fell overboard! It has a hook for a tail, and an eyepatch and everything! You need to fetch me that fish, so I can be as cool as a pirate! Obviously it's out in the ocean somewhere! Duh!(Caught in Ocean)

I finally found a jungle cat that likes water! I think it's because it's also part fish. I don't know why this happened, and I don't want to know. I just want it in my hands, and make it snappy!(Caught in Jungle Surface)

There's a rumor going around that there are islands that float high up in the sky, and that they have amazing treasure! Who cares about that though, what's even cooler is that sometimes lakes form in the clouds, and in those lakes are fish made out of clouds! I wanna know what it tastes like, so you better go catch it for me!(Caught in Sky Lakes)

I saw this bright orange and colorful fish by the ocean, and it was looking around frantically as though it was seeking a lost family member! Go catch it for me, so that another one will show up looking frantically for him instead!(Caught in Ocean)

There's a cursed fish swimming in the waters of the deepest corruption! It was forged of the cursed flames that spread from the fallen horrors that lurk down there. They say not even water can put out this fire, and that it can burn forever. I can think of some awesome things I can do with a fish like that! You gonna go get it for me, or are you too chicken!?(Caught in Corruption)
I hear in the underworld, that the King of all demons is actually a fish! Just imagine the absolute power I would have if you caught it for me!(Caught in Caverns)

Those Derplings in the jungle are the most scary creatures I've ever seen! Good thing is, sometimes they don't have legs! These ones live in the water and are a lot less scary! Catch me one now so I can see what they taste like without being scared half to death!(Caught in Jungle Surface)

I was reeling in the big one when this funny talking zombie burst out of the forest lake and started rambling on about this 'ferocious' species of fish made out of dirt! He says it could suffocate ten blokes his size, or something like that... I want it! NOW!(Caught in Surface & Underground)

The demolitionist was raising cane about losing a stick of dynamite in the lake out in the forest. He has like, so many, so why does one matter? Apparently, because it grew fins and started swimming away! I don't know where he gets his materials to make those things, but that one is clearly possessed! Reel it in and bring it to me, I always wanted a suicide bombing fish! Don't ask why...(Caught in Surface)

I bet you're not brave enough to find the Eater of Plankton. A corrupt fish that was mutated from a severed piece of the Eater of Worlds itself! Capture it and bring it to me, and prove to me you're not a wuss!(Caught in Corruption)

I love collecting those bright yellow stars that fall from the sky! I love it even more when they land on someone's head. But.. but.. nothing beats a star that falls in a foresty lake and turns into a fish! That's just totally rad, and you're just rad enough to get it for me!(Caught in Sky Lakes & Surface)

I don't know what's worse, a bone fish or a bone fish with HANDS. This Fish-o-Tron deep in the caverns really freaks me out! I think it's possessed by the same evil spirits that possessed that old man by the dungeon! I double duck dare you to go catch it!(Caught in Caverns)

There's a legend of a mighty being known as the Fishron! It's part pig, part dragon, and part FISH! I hear it hangs around in the frozen subterranean lakes of the coldest part of the world! I'm not going there, so YOU go catch it and makes sure it lands in my hands! I'm so excited!(Caught in Underground Tundra)

Those demons in the underworld really like voodoo dolls, but I think there's a doll out there who was blasted with way too much magic! It turned into a fish and it does stuff on its own. I dare you to go down and get me one! I'd watch out for the boiling lava, because it burns you to death and that won't get me my fish!(Caught in Caverns)

I was trying to sleep by the hill lakeside when this fish swooped down at me. It was flying! It also had the face of a lady and had feathers! I think I screamed louder than she did! Hey you, go make her pay for scaring me like that!(Caught in Sky Lakes & Surface)

There's a piece of the Hunger that morphed from the Wall of Flesh into a small fish-like thing that swims around aimlessly in the underworld and it's gross and it's yucky and I want it now!(Caught in Caverns)

Did you know deep in the crimson, some of those creatures make this gross yellow stuff? I overheard a crazy story about a pool of it having melted together into a shape of a fish and it swims around and everything! Fetch it for me, so I can stick it in someone's toilet!(Caught in Crimson)

A really long fish that looks like a sword's sheath swims in the murky waters of the corruption! It looks a lot like ebonstone, so don't let it fool you! That's right, you. You're catching it, not me!(Caught in Corruption)

Oooooohhh, I'm going to be SO rich! Deep in the caverns, there is a fish made out of gemstones! Don't ask me how, I don't know, all I know is that this fish is totally awesome and you're going to catch it for me!(Caught in Underground & Caverns)

There's some interesting critters to be found in the deeper Hallows, I tell you! They glow this crazy purple color and it messes with my eyes! It's totally wild, so I want you to catch a fish like that for me!(Caught in Underground Hallow)

Watch your step when wading through jungle waters! Why? No, not because I care about you being eaten by piranhas. I care because you'll step on one of my favorite kinds of fish, the Mud Fish! I also care a lot that you're going to grab me one as a pet!(Caught in Jungle)

What's white and tan and fluffy and lives in a frozen underground lake? A mutant flinxfin! I wasn't telling a joke, you know, there really is a mutated variety of Flinx that is more adapted to an aquatic lifestyle! I want it to adapt to my fishbowl, so make sure that happens!(Caught in Underground Tundra)
It's a whale! It's a dolphin! No, it's a penguin fish! Oh, and look, it's you! You get to bring me one! You do know they only like cold water, right?(Caught in Surface Tundra)

There's a really really rare type of pixie that's born with so many wings that it can't actually fly! It swims with the fishes in the lakes surrounded by that blue colored grass. My fish tank needs a lamp, so I want you to catch me that pixie!(Caught in Surface Hallow)

I read this ancient story about a fish that looks like a magical scarab! That's beetle, for simpletons like you! Where do you find it? Where do you think? In the desert, duh! Don't look at me like that... it's true! There is actually water out there! I'd go, but I don't like having my eyeballs pecked out by vultures. So... you do it!(Caught in Desert)

I'm sure someone, a really stupid someone, tried to tell you there was no water in the desert! They were absolutely and positively wrong! There's this thing called an Oasis, and it has water in it! Guess what happens when you have water!? That's right, you have fish! Weird fish that try to sting you and pinch you and do all kinds of other mean things to you! A perfect pet for me, and a perfect job for you!(Caught in Desert)
In the forest, the slimes are kinda gross. Slimefish are even more so! I don't want to swim with slimes, so yoink one out of the water for me!(Caught in Surface Forest)

I saw a fish that had eight legs! Nope! Not happening! You're fishing it for me, so it's not alive when I hold it! That's the last time I go fishing so deep in the cavern!(Caught in Underground & Caverns)

Apparently, Demon Eyes can sometimes be amphibious. They don't fly, they swim! I want to see the look on someone's face when they find it in their bathtub! They hang around the same areas. That means you reel one in for me!(Caught in Sky Lakes & Surface)

Piranhas and sharks are ugly! Soooo ugly! Did you know there's a fish that looks very pretty and still can eat your face off? I would pay 2 platinum to see that happen, by the way... To the point, though, you catchy for me. Just make sure I have it before you lose your face!(Caught Jungle Surface)

You ever wonder why the lakes on the surface of the snowy areas of world never ice over? I don't. The fish, however, do! A fish made out of ice would make a great offering to the mighty and amazing Angler ! Go, my loyal subject, and bring me this Tundra Trout with haste!(Caught in Surface Tundra)

Unicorns and rainbows are absolutely great! They're everywhere, even in the water. No, really, I actually saw a unicorn fish in the Hallowed lake! Your job is to reel it up and let me have it as a pet!(Caught in Hallow)

I know something youuuuu don't! Fine, I'll tell you, there's a terrifying creature that flies among the stars! I'm not making this up! It's called a Wyvern! But, but, you knew that already, right? Well what you don't know is that they are born and raised as tadpoles! So, they're actually like.. well, a frog! Hop to it and get me one!(Caught in Sky Lakes)

You won't believe it! I caught a fish in the forest at night that was already dead! Then it tried to eat me! I threw it away and ran! Now I want to stick it in someone's dresser to see what happens, so go fish it back up for me will ya?!(Caught in Surface)
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.stat.0: Did you know I have %s amazingly awesome fish now!? That's because as far as errand monkeys go, you're actually a bit useful!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.stat.1: Wooow! You've bothered me, like, %s times! If I didn't have a cool fish for each time, I would be really mad!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_finishe: I have enough fish! I don't need your help right now!
You have entertained me enough for today, go.
I don't have anything for you to do right now.
一Only one fish a day, please go away!
I haven't even used the last fish you gave me.  I don't need another.
You are done, the grand %s dismisses you!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.0: Psst! I might have a job for you. Don't think you can say no, either!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.1: I want a fish and you're going to find me one! Ask me about it!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.2: %1$s wants YOU as the official %2$s errand monkey!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_ready.3: Hey! Just the sacrifi- I mean competent fishing master that I've been looking for!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.task_succeed: Oh! Thanks for the fish I asked for, now scram!
You make a great errand monkey! Now go away!
Muahahahahaha! You did it! You're still in one piece though, how boring!
Woah!? You actually did what I asked, and survived! Nice, hand it over and beat it!
Awesome catch! It's all going according to plan! He he he!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.0: Thanks, I guess, for saving me or whatever. You'd be a great helper minion!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.1: Wha? Who might you be? I totally wasn't just drowning or anything!
dialogs.terra_entity.angler.wakeup.2: You saved me! You're awful nice, I could use you... er, I mean, totally hire you to do some awesome stuff for me!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.0: Dude, get your hands off my gun!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.1: Hey, bro, this isn't a movie. You need to prepare ammunition separately.
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.2: I see you're eyeing the Minishark... You can't even imagine how it's made.
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.3: I want to buy something from the Nurse. What did you say? She doesn't sell anything?
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.4: Flying Fish? I call it target practice!
dialogs.terra_entity.arms_dealer.5: Don't waste your time with the Demolitionist. I've got everything you need right here.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.0: Thanks again for freeing me from my curse. Felt like something jumped up and bit me.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.1: Mama always said I would make a great tailor.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.2: Life's like a box of clothes; you never know what you are gonna wear!
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.3: Of course embroidery is hard! If it wasn't hard, no one would do it! That's what makes it great.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.4: I know everything they is to know about the clothierin' business.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.5: Being cursed was lonely, so I once made a friend out of leather. I named him Wilson.
dialogs.terra_entity.clothier.6: I keep having vague memories of tying up a woman and throwing her in a dungeon.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.0: Explosives are really popular nowadays. Buy some right away!
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.1: Today is a great day to court death!
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.2: Let me see what happens if I do this... (BOOM!)... Oh, sorry, did you still need that leg?
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.3: Take a look at my goods; they're all at amazing prices.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.4: Dynamite, this is my special panacea prepared just for you. It can cure all kinds of problems.
dialogs.terra_entity.demolitionist.5: Want to get through those evil stones, huh? Why not just blow them up with explosives!
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.0: Stay safe! Both worlds need you!
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.1: The hourglass of time is slowly running out. And you're not aging gracefully.
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.2: Two goblins walked into a bar, and one of them said to the other: 'A glass of beer?'
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.3: What does it mean by saying I'm all talk and no action?
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.4: You must stop the spread of evil.
dialogs.terra_entity.dryad.5: This world is much vaster... And the power of nature is stronger too.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.0: I bring you the richest colors in exchange for your wealth.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.1: Honey, your clothes are so monotonous. You really have to learn how to dye your dull clothes!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.2: The only wood I'm willing to dye is mahogany. Dyeing any other wood is a waste.
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.3: Oh, no, no, that won't do. Even if you have money, you have to trade me with rare plant samples!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.4: These dye bottles? Sorry, my dear friend, these are not for sale. I only accept the rarest plants in exchange for them!
dialogs.terra_entity.dye_trader.5: You think you can fool my eyes? I don't think so! I only accept the rarest flowers in exchange for these special bottles.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.0: Goblins get angry so easily. In fact, they can start a war over some rags!
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.1: To be honest, most goblins aren't real rocket scientists. Well, some of them are.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.2: Do you know why everyone carries these spiky balls around? Because I don't.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.3: I've just finished my latest creation! This version won't explode violently even if you blow or suck on it really hard.
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.4: Goblin thieves aren't very good at stealing. They can't even steal from an unlocked chest!
dialogs.terra_entity.goblin_tinkerer.5: Yo, I heard you like rockets and running shoes, so I added some rockets to your running shoes.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.0: My job is to offer suggestions for your upcoming tasks. I recommend that you come and talk to me whenever you encounter any difficulties.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.1: They said there would be someone to tell you how to survive in this place... Oh, wait a moment. That person is me.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.10: At night, stars are falling and spreading all over the world. They have extremely wide uses. If you see them, you must get them, because the stars will disappear after sunrise.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.11: No matter what is spreading wildly, you will realize that it's time to stop them.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.12: If you want to survive, you need to make weapons and build a house. First, cut down trees and collect wood.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.13: After you have a sword, you can try to collect some gel from slimes. Use wooden sticks and gel to make torches!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.14: If you have some ores, you need to smelt them into ingots before you can use them to make items. This requires a furnace!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.15: If you combine lenses on the altar, you may be able to find a way to summon a powerful monster. However, it's better to use it at night.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.2: You should stay at home at night. It's very dangerous to wander outside in the dark.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.3: In the Confluence world, you will obtain multiple times the treasure, but this also means taking on multiple times the risk.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.4: As far as I know, there are more humans in this world than in our original world.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.5: Sorry, sometimes I have to open the door.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.6: Those guys that can explode are more threatening than the average surface monsters!
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.7: The life mushrooms on the grass can sometimes save your life.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.8: There are Crystal Hearts underground, which can be used to increase your maximum health. You can use a pickaxe to break them.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.9: There is a lake with magical powers underground, and it's very rare.
dialogs.terra_entity.guide.jei_check: In Minecraft, I can't help you look up recipes, but I know a mod called JEI that can help you.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.0: Did you make sure your device was plugged in?
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.1: Oh, you know what this house needs? More blinking lights.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.2: DON'T MOVE. I DROPPED MY CONTACT.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.3: Thank you! Sooner or later, I'll end up like the other skeletons in the dungeon.
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.4: I don't quite remember what happened in there. Three, maybe four important things...
dialogs.terra_entity.mechanic.5: Oh yes, the Signal Adapter! It can connect the redstone here to the wires perfectly.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.0: Swords beat paper! Buy one right away.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.1: Do you want apples? Do you want carrots? Do you want pineapples? All we have are torches.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.2: Take a look at my dirt blocks; they're really earthy.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.3: You have no idea how much dirt blocks can sell for in other places.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.4: One day they will tell your legend... It's sure to be a good story.
dialogs.terra_entity.merchant.5: Kosh, kapleck Mog. Oh, sorry, that's Klingon, which means 'Buy or die.'
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.0: I need to have a serious talk with the Guide. How many times a week do you get severely burned by lava exactly?
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.1: See that old man wandering around the dungeon? He looks like he's in trouble.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.2: Hey, has the Arms Dealer ever mentioned going to see a doctor or something? Just asking.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.3: Got into trouble with the thugs again?
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.4: Don't be such a child! I've seen worse.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.5: Did it hurt when you did that? Don't do that.
dialogs.terra_entity.nurse.player_killed: Have you been killed %2$s times by %1$s? I'm curious who took your flag
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.0: I cannot let you enter until you free me of my curse.
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.1: Stranger, do you possess the strength to defeat my master?
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.2: Defeat my master, and I will grant you passage into the Dungeon.。
dialogs.terra_entity.old_man.3: Come back at night if you wish to enter.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.0: I know the difference between turquoise and teal. But I'm not going to tell you.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.1: The titanium white is all used up. Don't ask.
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.2: Try mixing pink and purple. It'll definitely work, I swear!
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.3: No, no, no... There are many kinds of gray! Don't make me start...
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.4: I hope it stops raining. The paint still hasn't dried. It would be a disaster if it rains!
dialogs.terra_entity.painter.5: I tried organizing a paintball war, but everyone just wanted food and decorations.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.0: We have to talk. It's... it's about parties.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.1: I can't decide what I like more: parties, or after-parties.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.2: We should set up a blinkroot party, and we should also set up an after-party.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.3: Put up a disco ball and then I'll show you how to party.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.4: I went to Sweden once, they party hard, why aren't you like that?
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.5: My name's Party Girl but people call me party pooper. Yeah I don't know, it sounds cool though.
dialogs.terra_entity.party_girl.6: Do you party? Sometimes? Hm, okay then we can talk...
Hmm, you look like you could use an Angel Statue! They slice, and dice, and make everything nice!
I don't refund for "buyer's remorse..." Or for any other reason, really.
Buy now and get free shipping!
I sell wares from places that might not even exist!
You want two penny farthings!? Make it one and we have a deal.
Combination hookah and coffee maker! Also makes julienne fries!
Come and have a look! One pound fish! Very, very good! One pound fish!
If you're looking for junk, you've come to the wrong place.
A thrift shop?  No, I am only selling the highest quality items on the market.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.0: As if living underground wasn't bad enough, jerks like you come in while I'm sleeping and steal my children.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.1: I tried to lick myself the other day to see what the big deal was, everything started glowing blue.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.2: Everytime I see the color blue, it makes me depressed and lazy.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.3: You haven't seen any pigs around here have you? My brother lost his leg to one.
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.4: I don't know the 'Truffle Shuffle,' so stop asking!
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.5: There's been such a huge rumor that's being spread about me, 'If you can't beat him, eat him!'
dialogs.terra_entity.truffle.6: I feel there are more of my kind here...
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.0: Which doctor am I? The Witch Doctor am I.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.1: Choose wisely, my commodities are volatile and my dark arts, mysterious.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.2: The heart of magic is nature. The nature of hearts is magic.
dialogs.terra_entity.witch_doctor.3: I sense a kindred spirit in the Etherian Dark Mages. A pity they are our enemies, I would have liked to learn from them.
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.0: I collected critters like you once, then I took a cursed fox bite to the knee!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.1: I may not know, like, a whole lot...but I can talk your head off about nature and critters and animals and wildlife and...
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.2: My older bro calls me a lycanthrope. It means I'm like, part animal or something. He'd know, though, because he spends all his time outside!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.3: I love animals, like, a lot! I tried to pet this weird looking fox one time, he sooo bit me, and now I became like one! Rad!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.4: Staahp pulling on my tail, bro, it's totally real, and like...totally hurts when you pull on it!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.5: Oh, THESE ears? Haha, totes better to hear you with, my dear!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.6: This one time, at critter camp, I woke up one morning and everything was torn apart! Like, wow, how did I sleep through THAT?!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.7: Wow, like, I've never seen a full moon. For some reason, it's like I pass out every time one's around!
dialogs.terra_entity.zoologist.8: I have noooo idea how I got here, but it's mega rad.

lore.confluence.meteor_diary: It's a very thin book, but it seems to have a faint glow.
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_0: Oops, you've found it. Don't tell others that the puppy is hiding here UQYQU
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_1: Hey, since you've found it, I'll tell you. In fact, one of the animals sleeping with you is probably an informant for the prison pillow.
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_2: The original brave didn't ask for anything in return. They only hoped that all souls yearning for adventure could freely pick up these precious gifts and shine their own light in the adventure. Please guard this kindness from the brave and don't let the shadow of interests obscure the light of freedom and hope in the afterlife.
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_3: I hope that the adventurer who sees this note can have a smooth study, a successful job, and everything goes well in life. No matter what the haze is, it will pass quickly because we all have to move forward towards tomorrow.
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_4: When will Confluence Fun Stuff start production? I've been waiting until I'm stupid.
lore.confluence.mysterious_note_structur: I have secretly investigated this dungeon... Instead of being considered a dungeon, it is rather seen as a long lost city. Besides the creaking skeletons, there are several buildings like apartments and a wide variety of public structures. These skeletons are said to be the locals here but nobody knows how they could've fallen into this situation...

However, indeed, the wonder is those rare rooms which look like armories with a huge sword on top. Each "armory" contains plenty equipment, with a locked chest... which I am unable to open but it lets me know that it contains valuables.

Those terrifying monsters are truly mad! I wish to leave this place... However, I found some keys in these strange structures resembling churches and those disgusting slimy monsters... There must be treasure here, but I haven't found it yet...

Mysterious clues of an evil ritual were etched into the enigmatic murals I found within the ancient ruins… I sketched them down. I had no idea what these so-called "Crying Obsidian" were before, but now I’ve finally found them on these towering, ancient doorframes… There must be countless secrets in this world that I still don’t know about. Additionally, near the patterns of the murals, I discovered several inscriptions. "Confusion, confusion, look towards the direction of the falling entity. The guide that directs you to the extraterrestrial object can still offer you new guidance. Sacrifice, using the weeping stone deity. Behold, its deep, lifeless eye sockets, pointing towards its homeland, long since departed."
lore.confluence.mysterious_slate_0: “A fun fact: In fact, summoners need to communicate with their summoned creatures spiritually. The armor protection can't be too thick, otherwise it will affect the communication.”
lore.confluence.mysterious_slate_1: “It all started when the Moon Lord sold the... (The content is covered by blood, and the whole picture can't be seen clearly)”
lore.confluence.research_on_cloud_blocks: It's obviously a very thick book, but it feels so light in the hand. Judging from the title, it seems there is another volume?
The pages feel very soft, just like silk. Judging from the title, it seems there is another volume?
lore.confluence.research_on_wheat_mutati: There are some powders mixed in the pages, but it doesn't seem to be the powder from the aging of the pages...
lore.confluence.village_exploration: It's hard to tell the exact age, but it seems to be very well - packaged...

patchouli.confluence.otherworld_note.cra: The Alchemy Table is almost the Plus version of the brewing table. Of course, it cannot be used to make the brewing table formula, but to make special brewing formulas. *b is made of wood boards, brewing tables, skulls, candles and glass bottles in!cs:hwb! Heavy duty tables*c.
Put materials on the 6 grids on the left and right, stuff the water bottle (or other special things) in the middle and upper, and then there will be finished products below.
If you race something randomly, your synthesis may become weird.

are naturally-occurring crafting stations found mainly in and around!w:co!The Corruption*c or !w:cr!The Crimson*c, rarely seen underground。*bThey are used to make many boss-summoning and other special items.*bThey cannot be taken away, picked up, placed, or made.
Place the item on the altar, right-click to take the item out while sneaking, and left-click to use the altar for synthesis when hands are empty.
Demon Altar usually appear underground in corruption lands, with a few appearing underground in various parts of the world.
Crimson Altar usually appear underground in corruption lands, with a few appearing underground in various parts of the world.
Altar
appearance
Crafting Table.. Workbench.. Crafting Table..
A Example

A refiner is a functional block that can convert gravel, silt blocks, snow silt blocks, marine gravel and desert fossils into more valuable items (such as ores, coins, and gems), or convert fishing waste into low-level baits.*2*oGarbage Recycle Bin 3000.

Just press the right button to the refiner by holding the item in your hand. The items in your hand will be refined at an extremely fast speed, and the result of the refining will fall out in the form of a drop.*2MAX SPEED!!!
Items scattered all over the floor.
You can get a refiner in a Wooden Crate.
GUI

The heavy workbench is a bit like an upgraded version of the workbench, but it cannot be used to make the 3x3 formula for the workbench, but instead makes the 4x4 formula for the heavy workbench.*bIt can be used to make a variety of building blocks, tools and decorative items.
In fact, it's almost an ordinary workbench, but uses a 4x4 formula.
If the recipe is the same, you can use the arrow on the right to switch the finished product.

It is more resistant to burning than blast furnace (and compatible with the formula of blast furnace!), which means this is an upgraded version of blast furnace.*bSomewhere in !w:nt!Nether Tower*c there will be a probability of generating the Hell furnace.
Enter the material in the middle 4 places, put fuel in the lower left corner, and wait for a moment and the finished product will appear on the right.
It doesn't fit the appearance of a furnace and a blast furnace, right? But it's not bad.
How to Use
In fact, lead anvil is the skin replacement of anvil, and its function is exactly the same as that of anvil.*2It seems... cheaper than anvil?
It's an anvil, otherwise.
Crafting stations
It sounds amazing, but it is actually a furniture builder.*bIn the box of !w:hi!Heaven Island*c, there is a chance to generate a heavenly grind.
Just like a stone cutting machine, it is ready to use.
Place the materials below three places, select the formula on the right, and there will be a finished product on the top.

Craftsman workshops can be used to make many accessories, and they do not need to be placed in order!*bMade in!cs:hwb!Heavy Work Bench*c with Wooden Planks, Red Wool, Book, Smithing Table, Anvil or !cs:la!Lead Anvil*c and Leather.*2Everything is the scheme of the Goblin Tinkerer!
12 material grids can be synthesized by surrounding the finished product in the middle.
If the recipe is the same, you can use the arrow on the right to switch the finished product.

patchouli.confluence.otherworld_note.foo: Cloud Dough is used to craft Cloud Bread, which requires 3 Floating Wheat to synthesize.
Restores 5 hunger and 30 saturation.*bGrants Levitation II (0:15), Slow Falling II (0:30), and Nourishment II (5:00).

Fruits are edible food items (except Mandarin Orange) that restore 4 hunger and 12 saturation.*bConsuming any fruit grants 5-minute Nourishment.*bStar Fruit, Dragon Fruit, and Grapes are exceptions - they restore 6 hunger and 42 saturation (capped at 20 due to overflow), providing 5-minute Nourishment II and 50-second Hunger Delay.

patchouli.confluence.otherworld_note.lan: *bHave you felt the dark undercurrents surging?*bThe fate of your world is at stake, but not only yours.*bThe shadow of evil forces shrouds two worlds, their fates converging.*bThe era of confluence has arrived.*bYou begin your adventure as these two worlds collide: challenge the unknown, save the world, or seek power for yourself.
patchouli.confluence.otherworld_note.man: Each character starts with 20 Mana Capacity (represented by one star on the Mana Bar).*bUsing Mana Crystals permanently increases capacity by 20 per crystal, adding another star.*bThis enhancement can be applied 9 times, totaling 10 stars (including the initial one) for 200 Mana.

Mana naturally regenerates when not in use until reaching the character's current maximum capacity.*bNatural regeneration rate is affected by movement state and current Mana level.*bAdditional regeneration can be achieved through potions, accessories, or collecting Mana Stars.
patchouli.confluence.otherworld_note.mat: Coins come in four tiers: Copper, Silver, Gold, Platinum.*bSpecial Emerald Coin has unique functions explained later.*bAcquisition methods:*iDropped by hostile mobs;*iLoot chests;*i!cs:e!Refiner*c.*2*o"Money makes the world go 'round, kid."   --Mr. Krabs

Coins can be converted between tiers using base-100 system.*bExample: 100 Copper Coins = 1 Silver Coin.*b1 Platinum Coin equals:*i100 Gold Coins;*i10,000 Silver Coins;*i1,000,000 Copper Coins*b(1 Platinum = 1x10^6 Copper).

Coins picked up, hotkey-deposited, or taken from containers auto-stack.*bManual container transfers require re-pickup for auto-stacking.*bManual merging: Hold coins and sneak right-click to upgrade.*b!cs:hwb!Heavy Workbench*c handles tier conversion.
Coins can be placed as blocks.*bCoin piles break into coins when destroyed.*bRight-click blocks while holding coins to place.*bPlaced coins have sand-like physics, no stacking limits.
Emerald Coins trade with Bankers.*bBankers use Gold/Platinum blocks as workstations.*2All coins drop on player death.
